column2: For garbled printer output, {{c1::PCL and PostScript}} are examples of page description language choices to check.
column3: The point is not to memorize every printer language. The troubleshooting clue is that the driver and printer must agree on how the page is described.
column4:
Why

This compact recall supports the driver mismatch troubleshooting path without turning the card into a vendor-specific driver procedure.
column8: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.56; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 5.6
column9: A+::220-1201::5.6 A+::220-1201::Domain5-Troubleshooting A+::220-1201::TroubleshootingPrinters Cloze Driver Memory Printer Source::Messer-v170

column2: Pickup rollers are commonly part of a laser printer {{c1::maintenance kit}}.
column3: Repeated feed problems can point to the pickup mechanism after tray loading is confirmed.
column4:
Why

The compact recall supports printer-feed troubleshooting without requiring a model-specific roller replacement procedure.
